title: Amarite Bat & Shurikens
description: Ever wished your amarite longsword was a baseball bat? No? I don't care. Oh yah shurikens are here too I guess.
body: A resource pack that simply changes the amarite longsword into an amarite bat & the amarite discs into shurikens. Should work for all publically avaible versions of amarite.![Image showcasing a player holding the baseball bat (Wow!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/397a8c8eba09e9f1e278ee30c427e91f31d55e19.png)
